commands.summary: Command lifetime tests passed for sidecar removal role, tombstones, late completion discard, and query snapshots.

tests_covered: query_command returns Tombstoned snapshot after active record removal
Late completion against tombstone is discarded and increments late_event_discard_count
allowed_operations_checked: Registry mutation APIs are private runtime APIs intended for GraphOwnerThread use
Public query path returns safe CommandLifecycleSnapshot copies
forbidden_operations_checked: No hot path registry access added
Late event does not read removed sidecar
Expired command id is protected by tombstone query
not_verified_boundaries: Multi-thread synchronization is not claimed in P7C; real owner-thread scheduling and hot-path isolation continue in later gates
